feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IP30H : Issue while scheduling maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while scheduling of maintenance plans with IP30H.

Maintenance plans are not getting scheduled.

Maintenance plans having scheduling indicator is " Time-Key date".

Please help me out.

entry.title: Measurement Document - Wrong Counter Reading difference reflected
entry.content:
Hello,

May I ask if someone may help explain why for one measuring point, when I enter a value in the Counter Reading, the calculated Counter Reading difference is correct whereas for the measuring point 12204, when I enter directly in the Counter Reading, the calculated Counter Reading difference is wrong.

For example, for measuring point 12203, when I enter in the Counter Reading, the difference is correct but for 12204, the difference calculated is wrong

12203

12204

Thank you.

entry.title: Set the Functional Location field as mandatory during equipment transfer, and validate both installe
entry.content:
Set the Functional Location field as mandatory during equipment transfer, and validate both installation and dismantling. Suppose on 10.12.2024, during the transfer of equipment to another location, I dismantle the functional location on the same date and then install it at the new location. How can I validate only the installation date while considering the dismantling date?"

 

UI SAP GUI for Windows SAP Plant Connectivity

entry.title: The settlement rule receiver : Issue with S/4 HANA EAM WOs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requirement: The settlement rule receiver should be selected based on the Account Assignment maintained in the Technical Object. For example, if a Cost Center (CTR) is maintained, then upon releasing the Work Order (WO), the system should designate the Cost Center as the receiver. Similarly, if a Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) is maintained, then upon releasing the WO, the system should designate the WBS as the receiver.

Changes Which I have performed in SPRO as In Settlement profile

  1. Valid receivers: CC: Settlement Optional and WBS Element: Settlement Optional
  2. Default Object Type in Default Values: Kept as Blank ( I tried this with CTR as well but no luck)

While trying to release WO one with CTR maintained in account Assignment of Technical Object and one with WBS maintained in account Assignment of Technical Object, Order is rejected to release since Settlement rule is not maintained.

Expectation is:

  • If the order type is linked to a Cost Center, the system will prefer the Cost Center as the receiver.
  • If the order type is linked to a WBS Element, the system will prefer the WBS Element as the receiver.

Am I missing anything here?

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: Multiple characteristics values for different lengths of LAM data?
entry.content:
PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

Hi,

I have created FLOC, attached linear characteristics to it as LAM, and configured everything including the organizational area. Characteristics are visible in LAM tab as they are assigned to one class and this class has the same organizational area. While assigning characteristics to class I have maintained the same organizational area.
Aslo while creating characteristics I have maintained multiple values.
Problems:
1—If I have assigned characteristics values on the classification tab of floc, then only I can see the characteristics in the below screen of the LAM tab. It copies the same value for a particular segment length.
2- I want the same characteristics but different values for different lengths. For example, commissioning of the transmission line was laid by multiple contractors, I will create one characteristic saying "CONTRACTOR" and I will name all contractors for different lengths in linear data characteristics value

Regards,

Kaushal Rai


I cant remove this name Vijay with another name.
Regards,
RaiSaab

entry.title: Multiple counter plan order not being generated
entry.content:
Hello! I am currently working on a multiple counter plan , when i schedule the plan after i pass the first cycle , an order is generated but as shown below when  i pass the second cycle no order is generated 

I used a cycle  : sequence 1 : 10000 km / 30 days   and sequence 2 : 30000 km / 40 days

Can someone explain to me why and what i am doing wrong ?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content: i am unable to find action log for task list.

entry.title: how to get equipment movement history?
entry.content:
hello everyone,

how can i know the movement history of an equipment, from which equipment to which equipment & from which location to which location, equipment has been moved.

entry.title: I have a serial number, for example 123. I need to change it to, for example, 456. How?
entry.content: I have a serial number, for example 123. I need to change it to, for example, 456. How?

entry.title: SAP Visual Enterprise view VDS files from SDK
entry.content: I installed the VES from SAP But dont know how to open these sample VDS files. Where it will stored.

entry.title: How to map hospital equipments in SAP EAM?
entry.content:
#PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

 

Hello Experts,

Hospital equipment such as ventilators, X-ray machines, ECG machines, anesthesia machines, and surgical instruments often move between various locations, and this happens frequently. Tracking their movements, recording maintenance costs for each location, and monitoring their utilization would necessitate continuous updates to the master data.

My question is whether there are any existing solutions to manage these hospital equipment in an Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) system. If so, could you please provide a brief explanation of how the master data for hospital equipment can be effectively maintained?

Regards,

entry.title: issue in planned date
entry.content:
hi all

there is discrepancy in planned date in IP24 and IP10 for an hourly PM.

can anyone explain why this happened? and how can I fix it?

@MTerence 

thanks,

Mary

entry.title: Maintenance Plan with Scheduling Indicator "Time-Key date" not getting scheduled in IP30H
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while scheduling of maintenance plans with IP30H.

Maintenance plans are not getting scheduled.

Maintenance plans having scheduling indicator is " Time-Key date".

Please help me out to get these maintenance plans scheduled with IP30H.

entry.title: SAP Hana public cloud any Standard permits are available or customized
asset inspection information use
entry.content:
hello,

i would like to know usage of "Asset Inspection Information Use" in equipment master.

entry.title: Strategy maintenance plan re-scheduling in multiple maintenance package scenario
entry.content:
Hello, 

If in preventive maintenance strategy plan has selected multiple different maintenance packages for example 1 year and 5 year.

And if there is only one time exception and need to postpone only that 1year maintenance package +6 month, in situation that order is not called. How to call and re-schedule that 1 year packet +6 month, but not make any changes for 5 year package and calls

What is the best model for preventive maintenance strategy plan and what options and best practicies there is? Multiple maintenance items?

entry.title: Higher priority work order reservation should not be able to access the stock allocated for such low
entry.content:
Hi Team,

when we have multiple Work orders, the highest priority work order will take away the stock from work order reservation with lowest priority.
As a result of this activity, when they do maintenance for low priority work orders, there is no stock available most times.

So, business has asked for a solution to make the reservation for such low priority as hard reservations. Meaning a higher priority work order reservation should not be able to access the stock allocated for such low priority order.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Maintenance Plan vs Item
entry.content: I have 20 pieces of identical equipment that share a task list with time based strategy. I made a maintenance plan that lists all 20 equipment in it's object list.  I need each object to have it's own monthlies staggered from each other, can I do that with ONE Maintenance Item, or do I need to make a maintenance item for EACH object/equipment? Please advise

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA: Configuration of Print Output for Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am currently working on configuring the print output for maintenance orders in SAP S/4HANA. So far, I have completed the following configurations:

1) Cros-Application Components -> Output Control -> Manage Application Object Type Activation

2) Cross-Application Components -> Output Control -> Output Type

3) Cross-Application Components -> Output Control -> Assign Output Channels

4) Maintenance and Service Processing -> Basic Settings- > Print Control -> Define Shop Papers, Forms and Output Programs

  • Define Shop Papers

  • Forms and Output Programs

When I try to execute the print output within the maintenance order, the system shows the interface attached.

I have also manually entered the required data, but the system still displays the errors shown in the figure.

What additional configurations are needed to ensure the print starts automatically without errors?

Thank you in advance for your help!

I have configurated the

entry.title: Consumption/Adjusting the usage Cycle to PRT in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,     

We need solution for below scenario in Public cloud.                                                                         The customer requires  PRT be utilize for 5 production cycles. After the 5th order, the PRT will go for Rework/Consumed and replaced with a new PRT for the 6th production cycle.                                          Is it OKAY to use Equipment PRT in this case??                                                                                   If Yes  For testing,  We have already created the Equipment PRT, along with a counter and a maintenance plan, and assigned it to the routing of the finished goods (FG) material. After confirming the production order, report is generating(Tcode- IK17) for the quantity of equipment consumed.            However, how can we get the report on basis of PRT used in No. of production orders and its restriction beyond 5th production order.

Is there any provision which suits better for above case except PRT                                       Please help
